issues.description: First effect missing duration constraint. Text states '[Opponent's Turn]' which requires duration: 'DuringOpponentTurn'. Current DSL has no duration specified.

Second effect completely wrong. Trigger should be 'OnKO' (not 'Activated'), with conditions checking for Amazon Lily/Kuja Pirates type AND base power ≥5000. Action should be 'FlipLife' with count 1, but trigger and conditions are incorrect.
Trigger 'Activated' is wrong. Should be 'OnKO' since effect triggers when a Character is K.O.'d.
Condition incomplete. Must check: HasCardOnBoard with type filters for {Amazon Lily} OR {Kuja Pirates} AND base power ≥5000. Current condition only checks HasAttachedDon.
Missing 'once per turn' enforcement. DSL should include mechanism to enforce the '[Once Per Turn]' restriction.
